faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for all unused items in their original packaging. To initiate a return, please contact our support team with your order number.

faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping delivers within 2-3 business days. International orders may take 10-15 business days.

faqs.question: How can I track my order?
faqs.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive an email with a tracking number. You can use this number on our website or the carrier's website to track your package.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. All transactions are secure and encrypted.

faqs.question: How do I create an account?
faqs.answer: Click the 'Sign Up' button on our homepage. Enter your email address, create a password, and verify your email. It takes less than a minute!

faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. Enter your email address, and we'll send you a link to reset your password. The link expires after 24 hours.

faqs.question: Do you offer international shipping?
faqs.answer: Yes! We ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping rates are calculated at checkout based on destination and package weight.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my order?
faqs.answer: You can cancel your order within 1 hour of placing it. After that, the order may have already been processed. Contact support immediately for assistance.

faqs.question: What is your warranty policy?
faqs.answer: All products come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects. Extended warranty options are available for purchase at checkout.

faqs.question: How do I contact customer support?
faqs.answer: You can reach us via email at support@example.com, call us at 1-800-XXX-XXXX (Mon-Fri, 9am-6pm EST), or use the live chat on our website.

faqs.question: Do you have a loyalty program?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our rewards program lets you earn points on every purchase. Points can be redeemed for discounts. Sign up in your account settings to start earning.

faqs.question: Are your products eco-friendly?
faqs.answer: We're committed to sustainability! Many of our products use recycled materials, and we offer carbon-neutral shipping. Look for the green leaf icon for eco-friendly items.

faqs.question: How do I change my shipping address?
faqs.answer: You can update your shipping address in Account Settings > Addresses. For orders already placed, contact support within 1 hour to modify the address.

faqs.question: What if I received a damaged item?
faqs.answer: We're sorry about that! Please contact us within 48 hours with photos of the damage. We'll arrange a replacement or full refund immediately.

faqs.question: Do you offer bulk or corporate discounts?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer special pricing for bulk orders (10+ units) and corporate accounts. Contact our sales team at sales@example.com for a custom quote.
